title: Feature Request: Customizable Dashboard Widgets for Specific Teams

posts.author: ZaraReed (ZaraReed01)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been using Monday.com for a while now and absolutely love the functionality, but I’ve noticed that some of my teams would benefit from more flexibility in customizing their dashboards. Currently, it seems like the same widgets are available for everyone, regardless of their role or needs.

Would it be possible to introduce a feature that allows for team-specific customizable dashboard widgets? For example, the ability to display only the most relevant data for each team without affecting other users’ views.

Thanks in advance!
